$description: Portable schema for the Lark 'FrnDOS Agentic Workflow Management' tasklist. The bootstrap script creates these sections + custom fields in the user's Lark tenant and stores the resulting GUIDs in the local workspace (.lark-sync.json). Agents reference sections/fields by NAME and resolve to GUIDs at call time. Phase is encoded as section membership (Kanban lane), not a custom field.

sections.$description: Phase Kanban lanes. Order matters — Lark shows them left-to-right. 'PRD Creation' must be the default section so new features land there on /workflow start.

custom_fields.name: Feature slug
custom_fields.description: Kebab-case unique key. Matches the workflow feature_slug.

custom_fields.name: Source PRD
custom_fields.description: Lark doc URL (original brief) or local path for dev-authored PRDs.

custom_fields.name: Impl strategy
custom_fields.description: Implementation strategy. 'vertical' = API-first then web wires real endpoints; 'web-first-stubs' = build web UI with dummy data, then API, then swap stubs.

custom_fields.name: Parent feature
custom_fields.description: If this feature is a P0/P1 split of a parent PRD, the parent feature slug.
